name: Kamananui (Moanalua) Valley to Dam
tagline: A flat, shady valley walk perfect for families who want nature without the workout.
parking: Free parking at the Moanalua Valley Park trailhead off Moanalua Valley Road
bestTime: Any time of day — the valley stays cool and shaded
talkStory: About 3 miles round trip to the small dam with almost zero elevation gain — it's basically a nature walk along the valley floor. You'll cross the stream a few times on stepping stones and walk through mango, monkeypod, and kukui nut trees. The dam makes a good turnaround point for families. This is actually the start of the much longer Moanalua Valley Trail to the Ko'olau summit, but the easy valley portion is its own mellow experience. Great spot for a peaceful morning walk with keiki.
